name: My Beautiful Genie
overview: Lila, a beautiful genie, who is accidentally stranded on earth. She loses her bracelet that is her transportation device while she's saving a man's life on a deadly accident. But unfortunately, Lila forget his face and only remember the tattoo in his chest. Lila has to get her bracelet back before 100 days or she will be vanished. During her journey, Lila falls in love with Andra, a producer. Turns Andra is the mystery man that she's been looking for. But If Lila wants to take her bracelet back, Andra will die. Lila is now torn between saving the love of her life, or save her own life.
